Class Datapersistance

java.lang.Object
persistance.Datapersistance
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPersistence
public class Datapersistance extends Object implements IPersistence
Provides database persistence operations for the application. Handles CRUD operations for expenses, users, budget cycles, and reporting queries.

      Updates the amount of a specific expense.

      id - the expense ID

      Retrieves a user by their ID.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the user object if found, otherwise null

    • createBudgetCycle

      public void createBudgetCycle(BudgetCycle cycle)
      Creates a new budget cycle and deactivates previous active cycles.

      Parameters:
      cycle - the budget cycle to create

    • getCurrentCycle

      public BudgetCycle getCurrentCycle()
      Retrieves the currently active budget cycle.

      Returns:
      active BudgetCycle or null if none exists
